testcase.name: AWS_PUBLIC_TO_SENSITIVE_DATA_PATH aws_db_instance.customer

failure.message: Public entrypoint aws_lb.admin reaches sensitive asset aws_db_instance.customer

testcase.failure:
ChangeGate detected a high-signal infrastructure attack path.
Remediation: Remove the public route to the workload or restrict ingress to approved CIDRs.

testcase.name: AWS_RDS_BACKUP_RETENTION_DISABLED_PROD aws_db_instance.customer
testcase.failure:
Detects production databases with backup retention disabled or reduced to zero.
Remediation: Set backup retention to a non-zero period aligned with recovery requirements.

testcase.name: AWS_RDS_DELETION_PROTECTION_DISABLED_PROD aws_db_instance.customer
testcase.failure:
Detects production databases without deletion protection.
Remediation: Enable deletion protection for production databases.

testcase.name: AWS_PUBLIC_ADMIN_SERVICE aws_ecs_service.admin

failure.message: Internet-facing ALB routes to admin service

testcase.failure:
Detects public load balancer paths to resources that appear to expose admin surfaces.
Remediation: Remove public routing to the admin service or require private/authenticated access.

testcase.name: AWS_PUBLIC_ADMIN_SERVICE aws_lb.admin

failure.message: Internet-facing ALB routes to admin service

testcase.failure:
Detects public load balancer paths to resources that appear to expose admin surfaces.
Remediation: Remove public routing to the admin service or require private/authenticated access.

testcase.name: AWS_PUBLIC_ADMIN_SERVICE aws_lb_listener.admin

failure.message: Internet-facing ALB routes to admin service

testcase.failure:
Detects public load balancer paths to resources that appear to expose admin surfaces.
Remediation: Remove public routing to the admin service or require private/authenticated access.

testcase.name: AWS_PUBLIC_ADMIN_SERVICE aws_lb_target_group.admin

failure.message: Internet-facing ALB routes to admin service

testcase.failure:
Detects public load balancer paths to resources that appear to expose admin surfaces.
Remediation: Remove public routing to the admin service or require private/authenticated access.

testcase.name: AWS_PUBLIC_TO_SENSITIVE_DATASTORE aws_ecs_service.admin

failure.message: Public resource can reach sensitive datastore

testcase.failure:
Detects public resources that can reach sensitive data stores through the graph.
Remediation: Break the public-to-sensitive path with private networking, scoped security groups, or service isolation.

testcase.name: AWS_PUBLIC_TO_SENSITIVE_DATASTORE aws_lb.admin

failure.message: Public resource can reach sensitive datastore

testcase.failure:
Detects public resources that can reach sensitive data stores through the graph.
Remediation: Break the public-to-sensitive path with private networking, scoped security groups, or service isolation.

testcase.name: AWS_PUBLIC_TO_SENSITIVE_DATASTORE aws_lb_listener.admin

failure.message: Public resource can reach sensitive datastore

testcase.failure:
Detects public resources that can reach sensitive data stores through the graph.
Remediation: Break the public-to-sensitive path with private networking, scoped security groups, or service isolation.

testcase.name: AWS_PUBLIC_TO_SENSITIVE_DATASTORE aws_lb_target_group.admin

failure.message: Public resource can reach sensitive datastore

testcase.failure:
Detects public resources that can reach sensitive data stores through the graph.
Remediation: Break the public-to-sensitive path with private networking, scoped security groups, or service isolation.

testcase.name: AWS_PUBLIC_TO_SENSITIVE_DATASTORE aws_security_group.public

failure.message: Public resource can reach sensitive datastore

testcase.failure:
Detects public resources that can reach sensitive data stores through the graph.
Remediation: Break the public-to-sensitive path with private networking, scoped security groups, or service isolation.
